scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/event-platform run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
